title: PublishedStyle
description: A published style from a team or file library.

key.description: The globally unique identifier for the style.

file_key.description: The key of the Figma file containing the style.

node_id.description: The node ID of the style within the file.

thumbnail_url.description: A URL to a thumbnail image of the style.

sort_position.description: A user-defined sort position for the style.
